variables.current: Save Money *Automatically* While You Shop Online
We NEVER sell your data — unlike Honey
CouponSnap finds and applies the best coupon codes at checkout — instantly and for free. Works at Amazon, Walmart, Target & 1,000+ stores.

variables.description: Three stat numbers in hero section

constraints: Keep the page truthful — do not exaggerate claims
Maintain privacy-first messaging (core differentiator vs Honey)
CTA must link to Chrome Web Store
Do not change store logos, blog content, or footer legal text
Keep page load fast — no external JS libraries
